query:
SELECT id, name, category, status, description, createdAt FROM leaks ORDER BY id;
SELECT handId, leakId FROM handLeaks ORDER BY handId, leakId;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3SoCqzRfnhrz7B5.fc077db4ca74 --database BFa4yaxy9c4cDn5az6aTTB --execute SELECT id, name, category, status, description, createdAt FROM leaks ORDER BY id;
SELECT handId, leakId FROM handLeaks ORDER BY handId, leakId;

rows.name: Overfolding BB vs BTN
rows.description: Folding too often from BB when BTN opens, especially vs small sizes

rows.name: Check-calling too wide on dry flops
rows.description: Not folding enough to c-bets on A-high and K-high boards

rows.name: ICM overfolding at FT bubble
rows.description: Too passive with 15-25bb at FT bubble, missing +EV shoves
